title: Exploding Water 3 Dusk Update
description: I have got rid of the spark gap and put two straight bar electrodes on a flat piece of insulator. As you can see it works pretty well. Iluzyon1 suggested this and i kind of agree - the thing is probably very rapidly creating hho and burning it as a result of the large surface area - still fascinated and got a few more things i would like to do here - but am off for a week so it will have to wait.
